blocks.title: Iron: Upper Push (Chest · Shoulders · Triceps)
blocks.subtitle: Barbell Bench Press · Incline Dumbbell Press (30°) · Standing Overhead Press · Incline Cable Fly (30°) · Dumbbell Fly (Flat) · Cable Lateral Raise

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Feet flat, arch legal, wrists over elbows, scapulae pinned.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Bench 30° — clavicular head bias; feet planted, scapulae retracted.
cue_card.vector: Press up and slightly in; dumbbells independent path.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Rack grip, glutes tight, ribs down, chin back.
cue_card.vector: Press vertical; head through at lockout.
cue_card.catch: Bar to clavicle without excessive lean.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR · Drop-Set: Execute até a falha, reduza 20% da carga e repita até a falha novamente. Sem descanso. (Não use a série drop como âncora de progressão — preserve o Best Working Set.) · Bi-Set Same Muscle: execute em sequência com o par indicado, descansando apenas ao fim do par.

cue_card.setup: Bench 30°, cables low, slight elbow bend fixed.
cue_card.vector: Sweep up on fiber line; constant tension.
cue_card.catch: Arc down until upper chest stretch.
cue_card.anti_pattern: Light-moderate load; stretch is the stimulus.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Slight elbow bend constant, supinated finish optional.
cue_card.vector: Arc bells up; squeeze without clashing.
cue_card.catch: Open until chest stretch at bottom.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR · Bi-Set Same Muscle: execute em sequência com o par indicado, descansando apenas ao fim do par.

cue_card.setup: Cable crosses behind body, soft elbows, lead with elbows.
cue_card.vector: Raise to shoulder height; constant tension.

blocks.subtitle: Mobilidade Torácica e Descompressão de Ombro · 10 min Esteira Inclinada (Zona 2, conversa possível)

blocks.title: Iron: Lower Anterior (Quads · Calves)
blocks.subtitle: Pendulum Squat · Sissy Squat · Hack Squat (Machine) · Leg Extension · Seated Calf Raise · Standing Calf Raise

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Shoulders under pads, feet low on platform for quad emphasis.
cue_card.vector: Drive knees forward over toes; constant tension arc.
cue_card.catch: Let arc guide depth; keep ribs stacked.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR · Low-CNS finisher to spend remaining time budget without axial fatigue.

cue_card.setup: Heels elevated or anchored, hips extended, torso lean.
cue_card.catch: 3s knee flexion with hips open — pure quad lengthening.
cue_card.anti_pattern: Use band assist if patellar irritation.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR · Rest-Pause: Última série até a falha, descanse 15s, repita com a mesma carga até a falha técnica.

cue_card.setup: Feet mid-platform, back flat on pad, knees align with toes.
cue_card.vector: Press through mid-foot; avoid locking knees violently.
cue_card.catch: Controlled 2–3s to deep knee flexion without pelvis tuck.
cue_card.anti_pattern: Limit depth if lumbar rounds off pad.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR · Bi-Set Same Muscle: execute em sequência com o par indicado, descansando apenas ao fim do par.

cue_card.setup: Pad at ankle, femur neutral, back flat on seat.
cue_card.catch: 3s lower without hip lift off seat.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR · Bi-Set Same Muscle: execute em sequência com o par indicado, descansando apenas ao fim do par.

cue_card.setup: Pad on knees, balls of feet on edge, full stretch at bottom.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Gastrocnemius bias — legs straight, full ROM.
cue_card.anti_pattern: Use machine or step for ROM.

weeklyMicrocycle.focus_label: Iron: Upper Pull (Back · Rear Delts · Biceps)

blocks.title: Iron: Upper Pull (Back · Rear Delts · Biceps)
blocks.subtitle: T-bar Row · Iliac Lat Pulldown · Pull-up (Overhand) · Face Pull · Bayesian Cable Curl

exercises.progression_note: Best working set 40 kg × 15 — calibrate @ 2 RIR · Hit rep top — +2.5% load

cue_card.setup: Hinge stable, handle to sternum, avoid shrugging.
cue_card.anti_pattern: Use chest support variant if lumbar tired.

exercises.progression_note: Best working set 20 kg × 15 — calibrate @ 2 RIR · Hit rep top — +2.5% load

cue_card.setup: Lean back slightly, grip wide, pull to upper abs/iliac crest line.
cue_card.vector: Elbows drive down and back — lat not bicep.

exercises.progression_note: Best working set 53 kg × 15 — calibrate @ 2 RIR · Hit rep top — +2.5% load · Loading: WEIGHTED (+10kg) para calibrar força relativa avançada. · Rest-Pause: Última série até a falha, descanse 15s, repita com a mesma carga até a falha técnica.

cue_card.setup: Dead hang, hollow brace, lats engaged.

exercises.progression_note: Best working set 17 kg × 15 — calibrate @ 2 RIR · Hit rep top — +2.5% load · Bi-Set Same Muscle: execute em sequência com o par indicado, descansando apenas ao fim do par.

cue_card.setup: Rope at face height, external rotate at end.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR · Drop-Set: Execute até a falha, reduza 20% da carga e repita até a falha novamente. Sem descanso. (Não use a série drop como âncora de progressão — preserve o Best Working Set.) · Bi-Set Same Muscle: execute em sequência com o par indicado, descansando apenas ao fim do par.

cue_card.setup: Cable behind body, arm behind torso line — long-head bias.
cue_card.catch: 3s to full elbow extension behind plane.

blocks.title: Iron: Lower Posterior (Hamstrings · Glutes · Calves)
blocks.subtitle: Barbell Romanian Deadlift · Barbell Hip Thrust · Belt Squat · Seated Leg Curl

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Soft knee bend, bar close to legs, lats engaged, ribs down.
cue_card.catch: Hinge until hamstrings peak stretch; shins near vertical.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Upper back on bench, bar padded, chin tucked, ribs down.
cue_card.vector: Full glute lockout; shins vertical at top.
cue_card.catch: Lower until stretch at bottom without lumbar arch.
cue_card.anti_pattern: Pause at top; avoid cervical hyperextension.

exercises.progression_note: Minimum viable deload fallback: MRV/CNS relaxed to avoid an empty training day.
Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Pad above heels, hips pinned, dorsiflex ankles optional.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR · Bi-Set Same Muscle: execute em sequência com o par indicado, descansando apenas ao fim do par.

cue_card.setup: Bench 45°, arms hang, neutral grip.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR · Low-CNS finisher to spend remaining time budget without axial fatigue. · Drop-Set: Execute até a falha, reduza 20% da carga e repita até a falha novamente. Sem descanso. (Não use a série drop como âncora de progressão — preserve o Best Working Set.) · Bi-Set Same Muscle: execute em sequência com o par indicado, descansando apenas ao fim do par.

cue_card.setup: Armpits at pad top, triceps on pad, wrists neutral.
cue_card.vector: Curl without lifting elbows off pad.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Bench, arms vertical, elbows point to ceiling.
cue_card.catch: Lower to forehead or behind head for stretch.

exercises.progression_note: Calibrate first set @ prescribed RIR

cue_card.setup: Elbows pinned to sides, slight forward lean.
cue_card.vector: Split rope at lockout; lateral head bias.
